prompt: Luxury typographic logo on solid black background. The text 'MM AGENCY.' in a single horizontal line, all uppercase. 'MM' is in pure bright white at extra bold weight, and 'AGENCY.' is in warm gold/amber (#C8952E) at a medium weight — creating an elegant contrast between the massive white MM and the refined golden AGENCY text. The period/dot at the end is also in the gold/amber color. The typeface is geometric sans-serif, clean and modern with wide letter-spacing. The weight contrast between MM (heavy) and AGENCY (lighter) mimics the Leverage logo style — some letters command attention while others recede elegantly. No icon, no symbol, no graphic element — pure typography only. Centered on black canvas. The white and gold palette communicates premium, high-end consulting. Vector sharp, flat design, no shadows, no gradients, no 3D effects.
negative_prompt: icon, symbol, graphic element, shield, mask, illustration, 3D, gradient, shadow, glow, neon, complex, busy, decorative, ornamental, serif font, script font, handwritten, rough texture, grunge, noise, blur, low quality, pixelated, realistic photo, photography, human, colorful rainbow, cyan, blue, green, purple, red, pink
